languages.text: "Ашмаги! Вот грязные ажи! {name}, мы вернем тебе Патент! Только один нюанс, шерин: пока никто не знает, что реликвия пропала — никто не сможет этим воспользоваться. Поэтому всем присутствующим лучше держать рот на замке".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Ашмаги! Вот грязные ажи! {name}, мы вернем тебе Патент! Только один нюанс, шерин: пока никто не знает, что реликвия пропала — никто не сможет этим воспользоваться. Поэтому всем здесь присутствующим лучше держать рот на замке".

"Ашмаги! Вот грязные ажи! {name}, мы вернем тебе Патент! Только один нюанс, шерин: пока никто не знает, что реликвия пропала — никто не сможет этим воспользоваться. Поэтому всем присутствующим лучше держать рот на замке".
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

languages.text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."
languages.original_text: "Ашмаги! Вот грязные ажи! {name}, мы вернем тебе Патент! Только один нюанс, шерин: пока никто не знает, что реликвия пропала — никто не сможет этим воспользоваться. Поэтому всем присутствующим лучше держать рот на замке".

traits.locale_text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we shall get your Warrant back for you! Only one little catch, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

"Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we shall get your Warrant back for you! Only one little catch, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

"Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we shall get your Warrant back for you! Only one little catch, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

"Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we shall get your Warrant back for you! Only one little catch, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

"Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

languages.text: «¡Ashmags! ¡Azhi inmundos! {name}, ¡vamos a recuperar esa patente! Pero no olvide esto, shereen: si nadie sabe que la reliquia ha desaparecido, nadie puede usar su ausencia en su contra. Así que será mejor que todos los presentes se lo callen».
languages.original_text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

traits.locale_text: «¡Ashmags! ¡Azhi inmundos! {name}, ¡vamos a recuperar esa patente! Pero no olvide esto, shereen: si nadie sabe que la reliquia ha desaparecido, nadie puede usar su ausencia en su contra. Así que será mejor que todos los presentes se lo callen».

languages.text: “一群坏种！肮脏的鬼怪！{name}，我们一定会替你把贸易授状夺回来！不过别忘了，亲爱的：只要没人知道那件圣物丢了，就没人能拿这消息对付你。所以，在场所有人都最好把嘴闭严实了。”
languages.original_text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

traits.locale_text: “一群坏种！肮脏的鬼怪！{name}，我们一定会替你把贸易授状夺回来！不过别忘了，亲爱的：只要没人知道那件圣物丢了，就没人能拿这消息对付你。所以，在场所有人都最好把嘴闭严实了。”

languages.text: « Ashmags ! Sales petits azhis ! {name}, on retrouvera la lettre pour vous ! Mais n'oubliez pas, shereen : tant que personne n'est au courant que la relique a disparu, personne ne pourra s'en servir contre vous, alors toutes les personnes présentes ici feraient bien de la boucler. »
languages.original_text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

traits.locale_text: « Ashmags ! Sales petits azhis ! {name}, on retrouvera la lettre pour vous ! Mais n'oubliez pas, shereen : tant que personne n'est au courant que la relique a disparu, personne ne pourra s'en servir contre vous, alors toutes les personnes présentes ici feraient bien de la boucler. »

languages.text: "Külboğazlar! İğrenç azhiler! {name}, Ruhsatname'yi geri alacağız! Unutma şirinim... Yadigârın kayıp olduğunu bilmedikleri sürece kimse bu bilgiyi sana karşı kullanamaz. Bu yüzden burada bulunan herkes çenesini kapalı tutsa iyi olur."
languages.original_text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

traits.locale_text: "Külboğazlar! İğrenç azhiler! {name}, Ruhsatname'yi geri alacağız! Unutma şirinim... Yadigârın kayıp olduğunu bilmedikleri sürece kimse bu bilgiyi sana karşı kullanamaz. Bu yüzden burada bulunan herkes çenesini kapalı tutsa iyi olur."

languages.text: "Ashmags! Diese verdammten Azhi! {name}, wir werden Euren Handelsbrief zurückholen! Vergesst nur nicht, Shereen: Nur solange niemand weiß, dass das Relikt verschwunden ist, kann dieses Wissen niemand gegen Euch verwenden. Alle Anwesenden sollten also den Mund halten."
languages.original_text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

traits.locale_text: "Ashmags! Diese verdammten Azhi! {name}, wir werden Euren Handelsbrief zurückholen! Vergesst nur nicht, Shereen: Nur solange niemand weiß, dass das Relikt verschwunden ist, kann dieses Wissen niemand gegen Euch verwenden. Alle Anwesenden sollten also den Mund halten."

languages.text: 「アッシュマグ！汚らわしいアジだ{name}令状は取り戻してやる！遺品が紛失したことを誰にも知られない限り、誰もそれを悪用することはできない。だから、その場にいる全員は黙っているのが一番だ。"
languages.original_text: "Ashmags! The filthy azhi! {name}, we'll get your Warrant back for you! Just don't forget, shereen: as long as no one knows the relic is missing, no one can use that knowledge against you. So everyone present had best keep their mouths shut."

traits.locale_text: 「アッシュマグ！汚らわしいアジだ{name}令状は取り戻してやる！遺品が紛失したことを誰にも知られない限り、誰もそれを悪用することはできない。だから、その場にいる全員は黙っているのが一番だ。"
